title: Decouple emergency stop delivery from queue mutation in ClearAndEnqueueAsync
description:
ActionQueue.ClearAndEnqueueAsync awaits the stop callback before acquiring the queue lock. A transient WebSocket failure on the stop path prevents the queue clear entirely. Make the stop callback best-effort with try/finally to guarantee queue clear happens regardless.

Source: memorysmith_agent_deep_audit_2026-06-25_a3be512d.md (Finding 3, 82% confidence)
